raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Dahwids ar fa-
weem Wihreem treschâ
Deena us Ziklagu nah-
ze/ tad btja tee Amalekitert prett
Deenas-Widdu Ziklagâ eelausu-
schees/ un Ziklagu kawuschi/ un
to ar Ugguni fadedsinajfschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Seewas/ kas eeksch
tahs btja/ bij tee aisweddschi/
fr masus ir leelus/ bet tee ne bij
ne weenu nokawuschi/ bet ais-
weddschi/ un pa fawu Zettu
gahiuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids ar faweem
Wihreem nahze pee to Pilsfaktu/
un rangi/ ta bija ar Ugguni fa-
dedsinata/ un winnu Seewas/
un winnu Dehti/un winnu Mei-
tas bija aiswesti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pazehle Dahwids ar
teem Wihreem/ kas pee winna
bija/fawu Balfi/un randaja/ ka-
mehr teem wairs Spehka ne bij
randacht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir Dahwida divi See-
was/Akinoama ta Jesreêliterene/
un Abigâile Nahbala Seewa/ ta
Karmelitera bija aiswesta 5.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwidam bija tohti
bai/ jo tee Landis runnaja to ar
Akintreem nomehtadt/ jo wiſſu
Lauschu Prahts bija skunnigs/
ikweens pahr fawn Dehta/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazztja us t
Preesteri Abjataru/ Akimelef
Dehlu: Dohd jelle to Eewod-
schurp/ un Abjatars nefte to Ee-
wodu pee Dahwida-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad waizaja Dahwids t
KUNG U/ fazzidanis: Bu-
man tam Pulkam pakkatdsihtees
arrig es tohs panahkschu? u-
winch fazztja tam: Dsennees/t-
panahksi tohs/ un pateefi atpestif
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nogahje Dahwids a
teem feschtints Wihreem/ kas po-
winna bija/ un nahze pee Bees-
ra Uppes/ tur paliffe zitti sta-
wofchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids dstinnah-
teem pakkat ar tschetrjints Wi-
reem/ bet diwisints Wihri tu-
palitke/ kas peekuffutchi bija/
tee pahr Beesora Uppt ne wa-
reja eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee atradde weennu
qiptera Wihru Lauka/ to wed-
tee pee Dahwida/ un dewe ta-
Maisfi/ un winch ehde/ un den-
tam Uhdeni dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un dewe tam weennu Wi-
gu Pihti/ un diwi Kasina Pi-
tes. Un winch ehde/ tad nah-
winna Gars attat pee winna-
jo winch ne bij Maisfi ehdis/ ned-
Uhdeni dsehris trihs Deenâs u-
trihs Naktis.
"
    }
  ],
